items.name: Awesome-Guided-Image-Restoration
items.description: A comprehensive collection of resources on Guided/Multi-modal Image Restoration (GISIR/MISR), covering papers, codes, and datasets for super-resolution, enhancement, denoising, and deblurring. A one-stop reference for researchers.  引导/多模态图像修复(GISIR/MISR)领域的资源汇总，涵盖超分辨率、图像增强、去噪、去模糊等任务的论文、代码和数据集，为研究者提供一站式参考。
